name: nginx-multisite
description: Configures Nginx with three SSL-enabled virtual hosts, self-signed TLS certificate generation, HTTP-to-HTTPS redirects, security hardening via UFW firewall rules, Fail2Ban intrusion prevention, kernel-level sysctl hardening, and SSH hardening. Includes a multi-recipe structure, ERB-templated configs, rate-limiting zones, and a full security header suite.

name: cache
description: Installs and enables both Memcached and Redis (with password authentication) as a caching layer. Includes a ruby_block workaround to strip deprecated Redis configuration directives from the generated config file after the redisio cookbook writes it.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Deploys a full-stack Python web application by cloning a FastAPI repository from GitHub, creating a Python 3 virtual environment, installing pip dependencies, configuring a PostgreSQL database with a dedicated user, writing a .env file with credentials, and registering a systemd service running uvicorn on port 8000.
